response.overview: This short documentary highlights the LGBT Equality Alliance, the organization behind Phoenixville Pride, and their year-round work supporting and uplifting the local LGBTQIA+ community. Through interviews with Alliance members and footage from Phoenixville Pride, the film explores how grassroots organizing, visibility, and intentional community-building create safer, more inclusive spaces. Showcasing Pride as both a celebration and a commitment, the documentary captures the heart of an organization dedicated to advocacy, connection, and belonging beyond a single event.
response.title: See Me - LGBT Equality Alliance
